summary: A biographical overview of Andrej Karpathy's career, detailing his education, foundational work in deep learning and computer vision, and leadership roles at OpenAI and Tesla. The source highlights his recent focus on AI education through Eureka Labs and his coining of the term 'vibe coding'.

mental_models.name: Vibe coding
mental_models.description: A paradigm where AI tools enable hobbyists and non-programmers to construct applications and websites simply by typing natural language prompts, shifting the focus from writing syntax to directing AI.
mental_models.example: Constructing apps and websites just by typing prompts.

signature_quotes.text: Like many others both in/out of AI, I am very inspired by the impact of their work and I have personally benefited greatly from it. The future potential is especially exciting; it is a great pleasure to jump back in and build!
signature_quotes.context: Announcing his return to OpenAI in February 2023.
